title: Pecute Retractable Dog Leash with Rechargeable LED Light, 5m/16ft Tangle-Free Extended Leash, Anti-Slip Handle and Quick Brake Button, Suitable for Dogs Up to 110lbs/50kg
features: 🐾【Bright LED Light Design】 Equipped with a new LED light design, providing 50 lumens of excellent brightness, allowing for maximum visibility and safety when walking at night. Built-in USB rechargeable 600mAh battery has overcharge protection and can be charged for 3 hours to provide 3 hours of lighting. Whether you're taking your dog out in the early morning or evening, it can provide a pleasant walking experience for you and your furry friend.

🐾【Reliable Spring Mechanism and Braking System】 Internally, it uses a high-quality 304 stainless steel spring coil mechanism, which is strong and powerful, allowing you to retract and release the leash easily without getting stuck. With a comfortable and easy-to-use one-button braking system, you can release the leash to let your dog explore, lock the dog leash in place, or smoothly retract it.

🐾【360° Tangle-Free Design】The leash is made of high-strength polyester + reflective rope material, which is durable, wear-resistant, smooth, and won't tangle. The U-shaped opening design can correctly guide the leash to retract from any angle, while the electroplated zinc alloy buckle can rotate freely 360°, with dual-detail design to prevent the leash from twisting and tangling.

🐾【High-Quality Material, Easy to Use】The shell is made of durable ABS plastic, with an electroplated zinc alloy hook that is rust-resistant and suitable for outdoor activities. The handle is made of TPE material, ergonomically designed to be anti-slip and comfortable to hold, reducing hand fatigue during long walks.

🐾【Providing Two Sizes】 The leash comes in a standard length of 5 metres/16 inches, with two sizes to choose from - M size suitable for dogs weighing up to 66 pounds/30 kilograms, and L size suitable for dogs weighing up to 110 pounds/50 kilograms. Choosing the right size makes your dog-walking experience more enjoyable, whether it's for daily walks or long hikes.
